plugin.name: firemod-wayfire
plugin._long: Global Fireshit capability menu and Firemod Core bridge.

option.name: menu
option._long: Open the Firemod capability menu at the pointer and consume the triggering input.

option.name: enabled
option._long: Enable the global Firemod binding bridge.

option.name: autostart
option._long: Start the background Firemod Core authority when the Wayfire plugin initializes.
